_**Agent (composer-1.5)**_


Here’s a concise summary of the training setup:

---

## 1. LoRA training (`scripts/lora/23_lora_sweep_base_models.py`)

**Core script:** `scripts/lora/05_finetune_lora_same_dataset.py`

**Data files:**
- **prefill:** `artifacts_real/samples_gsm8k_train_ds2_fix_step2_gpt_prefill.json`
- **wait_recompute:** `artifacts_real/samples_gsm8k_train_ds2_wait_recompute_gpt_prefill.json`

**LoRA hyperparameters (13 experiments):**

| Group | Experiments | LR | r | alpha | modules | epochs | dropout | wd | warmup | ga_steps |
|-------|-------------|-----|---|-------|---------|--------|---------|-----|--------|----------|
| A | v3_lr1e6_r16_attn, v3_lr5e6_r16_attn, v3_lr1e5_r16_attn | 1e-6, 5e-6, 1e-5 | 16 | 32 | attn_only | 5 | 0.05 | 0 | 0.03 | 16 |
| B | v3_lr1e6_r4_a1x, v3_lr5e6_r4_a1x, v3_lr1e5_r4_a1x | 1e-6, 5e-6, 1e-5 | 4 | 4 | all-proj | 5 | 0.05 | 0 | 0.03 | 16 |
| C | v3_lr1e6_r4_attn, v3_lr5e6_r4_attn, v3_lr1e5_r4_attn | 1e-6, 5e-6, 1e-5 | 4 | 4 | attn_only | 5 | 0.05 | 0 | 0.03 | 16 |
| D | v3_lr1e6_r16_all, v3_lr5e6_r16_all | 1e-6, 5e-6 | 16 | 32 | all-proj | 5 | 0.05 | 0 | 0.03 | 16 |
| E | v3_lr1e5_r16_a1x_attn, v3_lr1e5_r4_a2x_attn | 1e-5 | 16/4 | 16/8 | attn_only | 5 | 0.05 | 0 | 0.03 | 16 |

**Module sets:**
- **all-proj:** `q_proj,k_proj,v_proj,o_proj,gate_proj,up_proj,down_proj`
- **attn_only:** `q_proj,k_proj,v_proj,o_proj`

**Other training settings:**
- Per-device batch size: 1  
- Gradient accumulation: 16  
- Eval steps: 7  
- Save steps: 9999  
- Save total limit: 1  
- Seed: 42  

---

## 2. Full fine-tuning (`scripts/full_ft/24_full_ft_sweep_base_models.py`)

**Core script:** `scripts/full_ft/13_full_finetune.py`

**Data files:** Same as LoRA:
- **prefill:** `artifacts_real/samples_gsm8k_train_ds2_fix_step2_gpt_prefill.json`
- **wait_recompute:** `artifacts_real/samples_gsm8k_train_ds2_wait_recompute_gpt_prefill.json`

**Full FT hyperparameters (10 experiments):**

| Group | Experiments | LR | epochs | wd | warmup | ga_steps |
|-------|-------------|-----|--------|-----|--------|----------|
| A (WD sweep) | ft2_wd0, ft2_wd0005, ft2_wd005, ft2_wd01 | 1e-6 | 3 | 0, 0.005, 0.05, 0.1 | 0.1 | 16 |
| B (warmup sweep) | ft2_wu0, ft2_wu005, ft2_wu02, ft2_wu03 | 1e-6 | 3 | 0.01 | 0, 0.05, 0.2, 0.3 | 16 |
| C (cross) | ft2_wd0_wu02, ft2_wd01_wu02 | 1e-6 | 3 | 0, 0.1 | 0.2 | 16 |

**Other training settings:**
- Per-device batch size: 1  
- Optimizer: Adafactor  
- Save steps: 7  
- Save total limit: 2  
- Seed: 42  

---

## 3. SLURM scripts (23a–24d)

| Script | Method | Model | Dataset | GPUs | Time limit |
|--------|--------|-------|---------|------|------------|
| **23a** | LoRA | Qwen/Qwen2.5-3B | prefill | 4× V100-32GB | 8h |
| **23b** | LoRA | Qwen/Qwen2.5-3B | wait_recompute | 4× V100-32GB | 8h |
| **23c** | LoRA | meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B | prefill | 4× H100-80GB | 12h |
| **23d** | LoRA | meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B | wait_recompute | 4× H100-80GB | 12h |
| **24a** | Full FT | Qwen/Qwen2.5-3B | prefill | 4× V100-32GB | 8h |
| **24b** | Full FT | Qwen/Qwen2.5-3B | wait_recompute | 4× V100-32GB | 8h |
| **24c** | Full FT | meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B | prefill | 4× H100-80GB | 16h |
| **24d** | Full FT | meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B | wait_recompute | 4× H100-80GB | 16h |

**Shared SLURM settings:**
- Partition: `GPU-shared`  
- Python: `/ocean/projects/cis250050p/swang47/miniconda3/envs/sft_yang/bin/python`  
- CUDA: v12.1.1  
- Logs: `/ocean/projects/cis250050p/swang47/yang/LostInTheSecond/logs/`  

---

## 4. Base models

| Model ID | Short name |
|----------|------------|
| `Qwen/Qwen2.5-3B` | qwen25_3b_base |
| `meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B` | llama3_8b_base |

Both are base (non-instruct) models.

---

## 5. Training hyperparameters summary

| Parameter | LoRA | Full FT |
|-----------|------|---------|
| Learning rate | 1e-6, 5e-6, 1e-5 | 1e-6 |
| Epochs | 5 | 3 |
| Per-device batch size | 1 | 1 |
| Gradient accumulation | 16 | 16 |
| Effective batch size | 64 (4 GPUs × 1 × 16) | 64 |
| Weight decay | 0 | 0–0.1 (swept) |
| Warmup ratio | 0.03 | 0–0.3 (swept) |
| Optimizer | (default AdamW) | Adafactor |
| Max length | 2048 | 2048 |
| Seed | 42 | 42 |

---

## 6. Output locations

- **LoRA:** `/ocean/projects/cis250050p/swang47/yang/LostInTheSecond/artifacts/lora_sweep_{model}{_wr}.json`
- **Full FT:** `/ocean/projects/cis250050p/swang47/yang/LostInTheSecond/artifacts/full_ft_sweep_{model}{_wr}.json`
- **Reports:** `documents/lora_qwen25_3b_base_results.md`, `documents/full_ft_qwen25_3b_base_wr_results.md`, etc.

---

## 7. Evaluation tasks

- `gsm8k_cot_zeroshot_unified` (1319 test)
- `hendrycks_math_500` (500 test)

Evaluation uses vLLM with `max_gen_toks=2048`, `temperature=0`, `do_sample=False`, and no chat template (base models).
